items.description: Interactive viewer routes (`src/lintpdf/api/routes/viewer.py`) — discovery flagged ownership drift between lint-pdf engine vs lint-pdf-ui plugin layer.
items.rationale: Viewer routes remain in lint-pdf engine surface; lint-pdf-ui plugin layer proxies through to them. Quincy ownership decision (Phase 0 alignment gate) deferred to future cycle; current cutover stays additive with the engine retaining authority.
evidence: QUESTIONABLE-DECISIONS.md 2026-05-06 lint-pdf legacy analyzer/API surface restoration

items.description: Legacy analyzers (`dieline`, `dieline_quality`, `art_size`, legacy spot normaliser helpers) flagged as removed during initial migration but required by full test suite.
items.originally_flagged_in: QUESTIONABLE-DECISIONS.md 2026-05-06 lint-pdf legacy analyzer/API surface restoration
items.rationale: Restored from commit 87353f7ff and re-mounted; full test suite green (3786 passed) as recorded in tests/criterion4_parity_validation.json. Replaces ad-hoc shims with the legacy analyzer surface; future cleanup tracked in future-moves.md (`Candidate lint-pdf stabilization move`).

items.description: Three analyzers (dieline / dieline_quality / spot_name_normaliser) had to be flagged for direct PDF parser usage; cutover required them to consume codex output exclusively.
items.originally_flagged_in: Cutover criterion 4 (zero in-house parse logic in migrated analyzers)
items.rationale: All three analyzers now reach PDF facts only through `lintpdf.codex_adapter`; verified by `scripts/parser_surface_audit.py` with reports/parity/parser_surface_audit.json status=PASS, and by the deterministic parity-corpus harness reports/parity/criterion4_corpus_report.json with diff_count=0 across two reruns.

items.description: Cutover required a deterministic, repeatable corpus parity harness exposed as a `lint-pdf` CLI subcommand.
items.rationale: Added `lint-pdf parity-corpus --root --output --baseline` in src/lintpdf/cli.py; baseline at reports/parity/criterion4_corpus_baseline.json. Two deterministic reruns produced byte-identical reports (sha256 match) with diff_count=0.

deferred_to_future_moves: lint-pdf stabilization — legacy analyzer compatibility cleanup once codex migration fully stabilizes
